hyperedges.label: Pre-Action Evidence Capture (DOM Debug + Snapshot + Highlight)

nodes.label: Natural-Language Playwright Testing Concept
nodes.rationale: Write test steps in plain English; AI resolves them to DOM actions at runtime, eliminating the need for hand-written Playwright selectors.

nodes.label: Shadow DOM Support Pattern
nodes.rationale: Only open shadow roots are accessible; closed roots fall back to vision-based resolution. dom-serializer emits shadow-root markers, AI sets shadowHost+pierce strategy, action-executor chains locators to cross shadow boundary.

nodes.label: AI Cost Optimization Strategy
nodes.rationale: DOM capped at 4000 tokens, locator-cache skips AI for repeated steps, GPT-4o vision only used when classifier flags needsVision=true or confidence drops below threshold.

nodes.label: DOM Resolution Path
nodes.rationale: Uses gpt-4o-mini with abbreviated DOM snapshot for cheaper and faster resolution of standard DOM elements. Preferred over vision for button, input, and link elements.

nodes.label: Vision Resolution Path
nodes.rationale: Uses GPT-4o with a base64 screenshot for chart/canvas/SVG interactions and low-confidence DOM results. More expensive (~$0.015/step) but handles visually complex elements.

nodes.label: Confidence Gate (DOM to Vision Escalation)
nodes.rationale: If DOM resolver returns confidence < AI_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD (default 0.6), automatically escalates to vision path to prevent incorrect element targeting.

nodes.label: Virtual Table Scroll Algorithm
nodes.rationale: Modern data grids only render visible rows; TableHandler programmatically scrolls the grid container to trigger the virtualizer to render new rows.

nodes.label: Cache Key Normalization Strategy
nodes.rationale: Key = baseUrl (query/hash stripped) :: lowercased+trimmed stepText. Allows minor URL variations and case differences to share cache entries, maximizing hit rate.

nodes.label: Pixel-Coordinate Chart Interaction Pattern
nodes.rationale: Chart libraries render data points on canvas or deeply nested SVG with no stable DOM attributes. Vision resolver returns viewport-relative pixel positions allowing exact visual interaction regardless of chart library.

nodes.label: Stale Cache Fallthrough Pattern
nodes.rationale: Cache hits are tried first. If element is stale (locator throws), execution falls through to fresh AI resolution which then overwrites the stale entry.

nodes.label: OpenTelemetry Auto-Instrumentation of OpenAI Calls
nodes.rationale: OpenAIInstrumentation wraps every chatMini/chatFull call as a traced span automatically, capturing prompts, completions, token counts, and latency without manual instrumentation.

nodes.label: Fallback Locator Strategy
nodes.rationale: ResolvedAction.fallbackLocators is an ordered array of alternative CSS selectors. Primary failure causes executor to try each in order, throwing original error only if all fail.

nodes.label: DOM Evidence Utilities Pattern
nodes.rationale: Three complementary utilities (dom-highlight, dom-snapshot-writer, dom-debug-writer) each serve distinct debugging purposes: visual overlay for recordings, text DOM tree for structure analysis, and multi-format evidence files for devtools inspection.
